source_path: 6. Contact360 Reliability and Scaling/6.4.99 — Local telemetry and readiness smoke evidence.md
codename: Local telemetry and readiness smoke evidence
summary: Local reliability smoke evidence for `s3storage`, `logsapi`, and `ai` services tied to era `6.4` observability readiness.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Document readiness dependencies as hard requirements (`S3STORAGE_BUCKET`, `HF_API_KEY`).

service.text: Ensure readiness failures are mirrored in runbooks and startup checks for local/CI envs.

surface.text: Expose readiness failure reasons in operator UI panels so teams can distinguish config gaps from runtime regressions.

data.text: Provision dev bucket and verify S3 object introspection endpoints return deterministic empty-but-valid responses.

ops.text: Add preflight config validator to block smoke runs when mandatory readiness env vars are absent.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Local reliability smoke evidence for `s3storage`, `logsapi`, and `ai` services tied to era `6.4` observability readiness.
